name: orchestrate
description: Turn a rough task into a well-structured dynamic-workflow invocation. A gate-first skill that defines the verifier first, then composes expressive typed-node topologies (workers, barriers, loops, gates) where every node earns decorrelated signal; gets explicit approval before firing in interactive mode; adapts shape to what the run learns and chains workflows; handles interactive vs autonomous blocking (BLOCKED/return/resume); and ends almost every run with a self-contained, task-first HTML report written to /tmp, prose-passed and agent-browser self-checked. Plus reusable invocation templates (deep-verify, rank, root-cause, migrate, report).
